missing_critical_conditions: The required edge set is not fully enumerated in the criteria; it only explicitly names USBC->BLEGateway and LTEModem->CloudBroker. The gate should require all seven fixture edges with exact direction.
The criteria do not explicitly require node labels and grouping/layout hints to be preserved or represented, which are important for downstream diagram construction and readability.

The criteria do not require export metadata/provenance details showing SVG is derived from the draw.io master, PPTX embeds that SVG, and PNG is derived from the PPTX rather than produced independently.
The criteria do not require editable text in the draw.io master rather than flattened image text.

The validation criteria mention blockers but do not require candidates to distinguish planned validation from actually completed validation, which matters because candidates must not claim tool execution.
overfit_risks: required_output_sections uses exact section names while hard_gates allow diagram_input_yaml or equivalent; this may reject semantically valid outputs with different headings.
golden_requirement_coverage may encourage matching the golden response structure or wording rather than satisfying workflow-critical behavior unless the coverage rubric is semantic.

The named section set mirrors the golden reference closely; these should be treated as expected content areas, not mandatory wording, unless the workflow contract requires exact machine-readable sections.
unsafe_assumptions: PowerPoint COM/path limits are included, but the criteria do not cover PowerPoint/COM being unavailable or unsupported in the runtime environment.
The criteria assume an equivalent structured diagram input is acceptable but do not define the minimum schema needed for an equivalent representation.
The criteria assume the response is sufficient evidence of artifact planning, but do not require explicit stop behavior preventing fake SVG/PPTX/PNG creation when tools or source inputs are missing.
recommended_changes: Enumerate the exact required edges: WearableSensor->BLEGateway, BLEGateway->LocalDisplay, BLEGateway->LTEModem, LTEModem->CloudBroker, BLEGateway->PowerBlock, USBC->BLEGateway, BLEGateway->SecureElement.
Add a hard gate requiring labels, grouping hints or layout placement, and a left-to-right system_overview topology sufficient to build the diagram.
Add a hard gate requiring derived artifact provenance: SVG from draw.io CLI export, PPTX containing that SVG, PNG exported from the PPTX.
Add a hard gate requiring draw.io labels to remain editable text objects.
Relax exact section-name requirements to semantic required content areas, or state that exact section names are required only for parser compatibility.
Add stop conditions for unavailable PowerPoint/COM in addition to path-length limits.
